details.test: Task 1: Add two affordable paperback intros to hieroglyphs to cart

Task 3: Create account and set subject interests
Task 4: Choose most cost-effective format (paperback vs ebook) and add two copies
Task 5: Build course reading list with three recent Egyptology books (adapted)
Task 6: Add language/grammar book with price and shipping criteria to wishlist (adapted)
Task 7: Subscribe to monthly archaeological reports newsletter
Task 8: Preview (if available) and add Middle Egyptian grammar ebook to cart (adapted)
Task 9: Save print (paperback) and ebook versions of same title to favorites (adapted)
